summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of iteration 4 features completed. All major features working correctly: Header dropdowns (Services with 3 links, Who Trusts Me with 3 partners + Case Studies), social icons in header/footer with correct URLs, 20 case studies with filter functionality, case study detail pages with Challenge/Solution/Results sections, Privacy page with 10 sections, Cookie banner with Accept/Decline, mobile menu with accordion dropdowns, 13 countries stat in hero, Canada in world map, correct email mauro@mauroferranteconsulting.com, sitemap.xml and robots.txt accessible.

issues: Shows '12+ Countries Served' but hero and map title show '13 Countries' - minor inconsistency

Hero section shows 13 countries stat
Cookie banner appears with Accept/Decline buttons
Header LinkedIn icon with correct URL (https://www.linkedin.com/in/mauro-ferrante/)
Header Facebook icon with correct URL (https://www.facebook.com/mfmarketingconsultant)
Header Instagram icon with correct URL (https://www.instagram.com/mauro_business_consulting/?hl=es)
Header Services dropdown shows 3 service links (PM, Digital Marketing, Real Estate)
Header Who Trusts Me dropdown shows 3 partners + Case Studies link
Case Studies Preview section shows 6 featured cards
View All Case Studies button present
Footer LinkedIn icon with correct URL
Footer Facebook icon with correct URL
Footer Instagram icon with correct URL
Footer email shows mauro@mauroferranteconsulting.com
Footer WhatsApp EU shows 'EUROPA & ASIA' (no phone number visible)
Footer WhatsApp LATAM shows 'USA & LATAM' (no phone number visible)
Footer privacy link present
World Map section shows Canada in HIGHLIGHTED_COUNTRIES and MARKERS
/case-studies page loads with all 20 case studies
Filter buttons work (All, PM, Marketing, Real Estate)
PM filter shows 7 cards
Marketing filter shows 7 cards
Real Estate filter shows 6 cards
/case-studies/cs-pm-01 detail page loads with Challenge, Solution, Results sections
/privacy page loads with all 10 privacy sections
/sitemap.xml is accessible
/robots.txt is accessible
Mobile menu opens correctly
Mobile Services accordion expands showing 3 service links
Mobile Who Trusts Me accordion expands showing partners + Case Studies
Mobile social icons (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram) present
Contact section shows mauro@mauroferranteconsulting.com
Hero background shows Dubai night skyline
action_items: MINOR: Update WorldMap footer from '12+' to '13' to match hero and map title for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: WorldMap.js line 176 shows '12+' but should be '13' to match hero stats and map title '13 Countries. One Consultant.'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features tested and working. Cookie banner uses localStorage key 'mfc-cookie-consent'. App defaults to browser language or Italian. Social URLs verified: LinkedIn=https://www.linkedin.com/in/mauro-ferrante/, Facebook=https://www.facebook.com/mfmarketingconsultant, Instagram=https://www.instagram.com/mauro_business_consulting/?hl=es. 20 case studies total (7 PM, 7 Marketing, 6 Real Estate). Minor inconsistency: WorldMap footer shows '12+' but hero shows '13'.
